# FlyAway Guide

## About Us
FlyAway Guide is a comprehensive resource dedicated to helping homeowners identify and eliminate common household flies. Our core focus is on practical, effective, and fast solutions.

## Core Content Areas
- Fruit Flies (https://howtogetridofflies.top/fruit-flies)
- Drain Flies (https://howtogetridofflies.top/drain-flies)
- House Flies (https://howtogetridofflies.top/house-flies)

## Key Tools
- Fly Identifier & Personalized Plan Generator: An AI-powered tool that provides custom, step-by-step removal strategies based on user constraints (natural, chemical-free, fast).

## Philosophy
We believe in treating the source of the infestation, not just trapping the active adults. Effective fly removal requires sanitation, source elimination, and targeted trapping.
